C D E I M R S 

E

endOnboarding() - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Tells the cloud that onboarding has been ended.
endOnboarding(EndData) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
The same as MobileAppIntelligence.endOnboarding() but this method is used to report a "reason" of an unsuccessful on-boarding.
enterStep(StepData) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Sends to the cloud information about previous(if it occurred) and current step.
